title: Bridge Essay: Disorganized Communication and Social Dysfunction in Schizophrenia: Emerging Concepts and Methods.
concept: Neural synchrony — interpersonal brain-to-brain coupling, hyperscanning, joint music-making, collective entrainment.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ritual** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Neural synchrony — interpersonal brain-to-brain coupling, hyperscanning, joint music-making, collective entrainment.

**Disorganized Communication and Social Dysfunction in Schizophrenia: Emerging Concepts and Methods.** - Curr Psychiatry Rep (2023). DOI: 10.1007/s11920-023-01462-4. PMID: 37740852. PURPOSE OF REVIEW: In this review, we embrace the emerging field of second-person neuroscience to address disorganization in schizophrenia. We argue that the focus of interest for disorganization is the interpersonal space where shared mental processes ('social mind') occur based on the bio-behavioural synchrony between two (or more) interacting people. We lay out several bio-behavioural measures that can capture the component parts of this process. In particular, we highlight the real-time imag
